name: Cilantro Pesto (Black Bean Chili Con Carne With)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the cilantro, garlic, and lime juice in the bowl of a food processor fitted with a steel blade.
2. Process until the garlic and cilantro are finely minced.
3. With the motor running, drizzle in the olive oil in a thin stream until well incorporated.
4. Scrape the pesto into a bowl and mix in the sour cream.
5. Add salt to taste.
6. Refrigerate until needed.
Serving Suggestion: Black Bean Chili Con Carne
